name: Crunchy Waffle
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------
STRAWBERRY-BANANA SAUCE
1 1/2 cups Maple syrup
1 cup Sliced bananas
2 cups Strawberries (hulled and halved)
Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan. Cook over medium high heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Crunchy Waffle:
1. Combine dry ingredients; stir well.
2. Beat eggs until thick and lemon colored.
3. Add flour mix, buttermilk, syrup, and oil to the beaten eggs. Mix until smooth.
4. Cook on a hot, lightly oiled waffle iron.
5. Sprinkle chopped pecans onto the top before cooking.
6. Serve with topping of Strawberry-Banana Sauce and plain yogurt.
